name: Black Forest Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Sour cherries (rinsed, stemmed, and pitted)
recipeInstructions: PREHEAT THE OVEN TO 350°F and set a rack in the middle level. For the batter, finely cut the chocolate and place it in a small bowl over hot water to melt, stirring occasionally. Beat the butter with half the sugar until soft and light. Add the melted chocolate, then beat in the yolks one at a time. Stir in the kirsch. Combine the almonds and bread crumbs and stir into the mixture. Fold in the cherries. Beat the egg whites until they hold a very soft peak, then beat in the remaining sugar slowly. Add about 1/4 of the whites to the batter, then fold in the rest with a rubber spatula. Pour the batter into a buttered and floured 2-quart gratin dish or other baking dish. Bake for about 30 minutes, or until well puffed. Serve the pudding immediately, or allow it to cool slightly before serving it warm or at room temperature.
